The endpoint `mass_all` doesn't seem to be the right one. Let me look at the LipidMaps API documentation to find the correct endpoint.

Actually, the error says "This input item does not exist. Choose from: 'formula','regno','inchi_key','lm_id','pubchem_cid','hmdb_id','kegg_id','chebi_id','smiles','abbrev','abbrev_chains'"

This suggests this endpoint expects a different kind of input. Maybe the batch mass search is at a different URL.

Let me try some other possible endpoints.

Looking at the LipidMaps REST API documentation:
- For mass search: might be at `/rest/compound/mass`
- For batch: might be different

Let me try different URLs.

function.name: run_custom_test
function.arguments:
{"code": "import requests
import pandas as pd
from io import StringIO

# Try different possible endpoints
endpoints = [
    "https://www.lipidmaps.org/rest/compound/mass_all",
    "https://www.lipidmaps.org/rest/compounds/mass_all",
    "https://www.lipidmaps.org/rest/compound/mass",
    "https://www.lipidmaps.org/rest/compounds/mass",
    "https://www.lipidmaps.org/rest/compound/mass/batch",
    "https://www.lipidmaps.org/rest/compounds/mass/batch",
]

for ep in endpoints:
    try:
        response = requests.post(ep, files={
            'mz': (None, '100.0\n200.0\n300.0'),
            'tolerance': (None, '0.01'),
            'database': (None, 'GLYCOLIPIDS'),
            'adducts': (None, 'M+H,M+Na')
        }, timeout=10)
        print(f"{ep}: status={response.status_code}, first 200 chars: {response.text[:200]}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"{ep}: error={e}")
", "test_snippet": ""}
